action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 6 rewrote predict.py with an improved heuristic (momentum, history penalties, stronger visited penalty, step-budget guard, frontier fallback) and ran a smoke test successfully, but evaluation was never submitted. The current best score remains 0.6013 from iteration 2. Analysis: We need to measure whether the iteration-6 heuristic improves over the 0.6013 baseline. Because the predict.py visible in the context was truncated, there is a risk the file is incomplete; therefore I will rewrite both predict.py and train.py completely to ensure a robust, crash-free submission. Decision: Write a clean, complete predict.py implementing the iteration-6 heuristic, regenerate the dummy checkpoint with train.py, and immediately submit evaluation to obtain a score and iteration-time measurement.
